title: Share a dashboard calendar

posts.author: Hansu (Hansu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi,

I have a dashboard that features a calendar view of events and marketing campaigns dates (from 13 different boards), and I want to share this dashboard calendar with our entire organization. Only my marketing team has access to Monday, and I cannot invite 500+ people to view the calendar in Monday. I’d rather embed the dashboard calendar on to our internal site. The calendar consolidates events and other markings from multiple boards from one workspace, 13 different boards all together.

What are you trying to achieve

Is there a way around this to embed the dashboard calendar on to our intranet site? I know a workaround would be to share every 13 boards calendar one by one, but we just can not have 13 different calendars for my organization to look through

posts.author: zoe.sgt (Zoe | SGTLab)
posts.cookedHtml:
Totally understand as a marketer
Would you need that view to update in real-time, or would a snapshot that refreshes periodically work too? If real-time isn’t critical, syncing your Monday boards with Google Calendar or Outlook to embed one shared calendar.

posts.author: Hansu (Hansu)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so so much! …Haven’t even considered those! Have to look up if that could work and if those could be embed to our internal site!
